bird.name: Junín canastero
bird.summary: The Junin canastero (Asthenes virgata) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is endemic…

locations.name: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室
locations.summary: 康乃爾大學鳥類學實驗室位於纽约州伊萨卡，是康乃爾大學研究鳥類學和其他野生生物的成員支援單位。位在薩普薩克森林保護區（Sapsucker Woods Sanctuary）伊莫金約翰遜鳥類和生物多樣性研究院中心（Imogene Powers…

relations.subject: Junín canastero
relations.evidence: There are scattered sightings between these two population centers. The Junin canastero primarily inhabits humid landscapes with tall bunch grass, sometimes those with scattered bushes and near stands of polylepis

relations.subject: Junín canastero
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "This canastero potentially is vulnerable to habitat loss or degradation, such as through overgrazing."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
